esv_version: The LORD gives strength to his people; the LORD blesses his people with peace.
niv_version: The LORD gives strength to his people; the LORD blesses his people with peace.
reflection: God gives you strength when you feel tired and blesses you with peace when things feel busy. He wants your heart to feel calm and strong. You are never too small for His big help.
live_it_out:
1. When you feel tired, say "God gives me strength."
2. Take a quiet moment and feel His peace.
3. Thank Him for blessing you with peace today.

esv_version: I will instruct you and teach you in the way you should go.
niv_version: I will instruct you and teach you in the way you should go.
reflection: God promises to teach you the best way to go each day. He gently guides you like a kind teacher. You can trust His direction.
live_it_out:
1. Ask God "Show me the way today."
2. Listen quietly for His gentle leading.
3. Follow one kind choice He shows you.

esv_version: The steps of a man are established by the LORD.
niv_version: The LORD makes firm the steps of the one who delights in him.
reflection: God makes your steps steady and sure when you delight in Him. He plans each little step with love. You can walk confidently with Him.
live_it_out:
1. Say "God, steady my steps today."
2. Take one small step of kindness.
3. Feel safe knowing He holds your steps.

esv_version: I waited patiently for the LORD; he inclined to me and heard my cry.
niv_version: I waited patiently for the LORD; he turned to me and heard my cry.
reflection: When you wait patiently, God turns to you and hears every little cry. He cares so much about your voice. Waiting with Him brings help.
live_it_out:
1. When you wait for something, say "I wait for You, God."
2. Remember He hears you right away.
3. Thank Him for listening.

esv_version: But for me it is good to be near God.
niv_version: But as for me, it is good to be near God.
reflection: Being close to God is the very best place to be. He makes everything feel right and good. You can stay near Him all day.
live_it_out:
1. Whisper "It is good to be near You, God."
2. Stay close by talking to Him often.
3. Feel happy in His nearness.

esv_version: The LORD God is a sun and shield; the LORD bestows favor and honor.
niv_version: For the LORD God is a sun and shield; the LORD bestows favor and honor.
reflection: God is like a warm sun that lights your way and a shield that keeps you safe. He gives you favor and honor just because you are His.
live_it_out:
1. Feel the sun and remember God is your sun.
2. Say "You are my shield, God."
3. Thank Him for His favor today.

esv_version: But you, O Lord, are a God merciful and gracious.
niv_version: But you, Lord, are a compassionate and gracious God.
reflection: God is full of mercy and grace—He is kind and forgiving every time. His heart toward you is gentle and full of love.
live_it_out:
1. When you make a mistake, say "God, You are merciful."
2. Show grace to someone who needs it.
3. Feel safe in His gracious arms.

esv_version: Blessed is the man who fears the LORD.
niv_version: Blessed is the one who fears the LORD.
reflection: God blesses those who love and respect Him. That blessing feels like sunshine on your heart. You can be one of His blessed children.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I love and respect You, God."
2. Do one thing that shows you honor Him.
3. Feel blessed by His love.

esv_version: On the day I called, you answered me.
niv_version: When I called, you answered me.
reflection: The moment you call on God, He answers you. He is never too busy for your voice. His answer brings comfort and help.
live_it_out:
1. Call on God with a simple prayer today.
2. Listen for His gentle answer in your heart.
3. Thank Him for always answering.

esv_version: Blessed are the people whose God is the LORD.
niv_version: Blessed are the people whose God is the LORD.
reflection: When the Lord is your God, you are truly blessed. He takes care of His people with love every day. You belong to the best family.
live_it_out:
1. Say "The Lord is my God!" with joy.
2. Remember you are one of His blessed people.
3. Share a smile because you are blessed.

esv_version: For the LORD gives wisdom.
niv_version: For the LORD gives wisdom.
reflection: God loves to give you wisdom—smart and kind thoughts for your day. He helps you know what to do. You can ask Him anytime.
live_it_out:
1. Ask God "Please give me wisdom today."
2. Think before you speak or act.
3. Thank Him when you feel wise.

esv_version: Righteousness exalts a nation.
niv_version: Righteousness exalts a nation.
reflection: Doing what is right makes everything better. God smiles when you choose right. It brings joy to your little world too.
live_it_out:
1. Choose to do the right thing today.
2. Help make your home or school better.
3. Feel good inside when you do right.

esv_version: The LORD waits to be gracious to you.
niv_version: The LORD waits to be gracious to you.
reflection: God is waiting right now to be kind and gracious to you. His arms are open and ready. You never have to wait long for His love.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Thank You for waiting to be kind to me, God."
2. Run to Him with open arms in prayer.
3. Feel His grace all around you.

esv_version: For I, the LORD your God, hold your right hand.
niv_version: For I am the LORD your God who takes hold of your right hand.
reflection: God holds your right hand every step you take. He never lets go and walks with you. You are safe and loved in His grip.
live_it_out:
1. Hold your right hand out like God is holding it.
2. Say "You hold my hand, God."
3. Feel safe wherever you go today.

esv_version: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the LORD, plans for welfare and not for evil.
niv_version: For I know the plans I have for you,” declares the LORD, “plans to prosper you and not to harm you.
reflection: God has good plans for you—plans to help you and give you hope. He thinks about you all the time. You can trust His plans.
live_it_out:
1. Say "God has good plans for me!"
2. Look forward to the good things coming.
3. Thank Him for thinking of you.

esv_version: To do justice, and to love kindness, and to walk humbly with your God.
niv_version: To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God.
reflection: God asks you to be fair, love kindness, and walk humbly with Him. It’s a gentle way to live that makes Him happy. You can do it with His help.
live_it_out:
1. Be fair and share with others.
2. Show kindness in one small way.
3. Walk humbly by holding God’s hand.

esv_version: Let your light shine before others.
niv_version: Let your light shine before others.
reflection: Jesus says your light can shine for others to see. When you are kind and loving, people see God’s light through you. It makes the world brighter.
live_it_out:
1. Let your light shine by being kind today.
2. Smile so others see Jesus’ light.
3. Thank God for making you a light.

esv_version: For where your treasure is, there your heart will be also.
niv_version: For where your treasure is, there your heart will be also.
reflection: What you treasure most is where your heart stays. God wants your heart to treasure Him most of all. That brings the greatest joy.
live_it_out:
1. Tell God "You are my greatest treasure."
2. Choose to love God more than things.
3. Feel your heart happy with Him.

esv_version: Ask, and it will be given to you.
niv_version: Ask and it will be given to you.
reflection: Jesus invites you to ask God for what you need. He loves to give good things to His children. You can ask with a trusting heart.
live_it_out:
1. Ask God for something you need today.
2. Trust that He hears and cares.
3. Say thank you even before the answer.

esv_version: Ask, and it will be given to you.
niv_version: Ask and it will be given to you.
reflection: God’s door is always open when you ask. He is ready to give you good gifts because He loves you. Asking brings you closer to Him.
live_it_out:
1. Pray a simple ask to God right now.
2. Believe He wants to answer you.
3. Feel close to your loving Father.

esv_version: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give to you.
niv_version: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give you.
reflection: Jesus gives you His very own peace. It is a calm and gentle peace that stays with you. You can carry it in your heart all day.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Jesus, thank You for Your peace."
2. Breathe slowly and feel His peace.
3. Share peace with someone who needs it.

esv_version: If possible, so far as it depends on you, live peaceably with all.
niv_version: If it is possible, as far as it depends on you, live at peace with everyone.
reflection: God wants you to live in peace with everyone as much as you can. It makes life sweeter and shows His love. He helps you do it.
live_it_out:
1. Choose peaceful words when playing.
2. Be the first to say sorry if needed.
3. Ask God to help you live in peace.

esv_version: With all humility and gentleness, with patience.
niv_version: Be completely humble and gentle; be patient.
reflection: God asks you to be humble, gentle, and patient with others. These qualities make your heart beautiful like His. He grows them in you.
live_it_out:
1. Be gentle with your hands and words.
2. Wait patiently without fussing.
3. Ask God to help you be humble.

esv_version: He who began a good work in you will bring it to completion.
niv_version: He who began a good work in you will carry it on to completion until the day of Christ Jesus.
reflection: God started a good work in you and He will finish it beautifully. You are growing more like Jesus every day. He never gives up on you.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Thank You for working in me, God."
2. Notice one way you are growing.
3. Trust Him to finish the good work.

esv_version: Whatever you do, in word or deed, do everything in the name of the Lord Jesus.
niv_version: And whatever you do, whether in word or deed, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus.
reflection: You can do everything—big or small—in the name of Jesus. It makes ordinary things special for God. He is pleased with you.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I do this in Jesus’ name" before a task.
2. Do one thing today for Jesus.
3. Feel happy knowing it pleases Him.

esv_version: Rejoice always.
niv_version: Rejoice always.
reflection: You can rejoice always because God is always good. Even on ordinary days there is joy in Him. His joy lives inside you.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I rejoice today!" with a smile.
2. Find joy in little things God gives.
3. Share your joy with a friend.

esv_version: Let us run with endurance the race that is set before us.
niv_version: Let us run with perseverance the race marked out for us.
reflection: Life is like a race, and God helps you run it with endurance. He cheers you on and gives you strength. Keep going—you are doing great.
live_it_out:
1. Keep trying even when things are hard.
2. Say "I can keep going with God."
3. Thank Him for helping you run.

esv_version: If any of you lacks wisdom, let him ask God.
niv_version: If any of you lacks wisdom, you should ask God.
reflection: Whenever you need wisdom, God is happy to give it generously. He never gets tired of your questions. Ask and watch Him help.
live_it_out:
1. Ask God for wisdom before decisions.
2. Listen for His quiet answer.
3. Feel smart because God helps you.

esv_version: Draw near to God, and he will draw near to you.
niv_version: Come near to God and he will come near to you.
reflection: When you draw near to God, He draws near to you. It’s like a warm hug from both sides. He loves being close to you.
live_it_out:
1. Move closer to God in prayer today.
2. Talk to Him like a best friend.
3. Feel Him drawing near to you.

esv_version: The God of all grace will himself restore, confirm, strengthen, and establish you.
niv_version: The God of all grace, who called you to his eternal glory in Christ, after you have suffered a little while, will himself restore you and make you strong.
reflection: God of all grace will restore you, make you strong, and set you firm. He takes care of you completely. You can rest in His grace.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Thank You for making me strong, God."
2. Trust Him when you feel weak.
3. Feel restored by His grace today.
